pokemon:duraludon.name: Duraludon
pokemon:duraludon.summary: The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.
Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.

pokemon:archaludon.name: Archaludon
pokemon:archaludon.summary: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It’s so durable that being caught in a cave-in won’t faze it.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
